name: C2xGetChannelConfiguration
title: C2xGetChannelConfiguration
syntax: long C2xGetChannelConfiguration(long appChannel, long radioChannel, long txPower, long maxTxPower, long layout, long dataRate, long bandWidth, long txAntenna, long rxAntenna)
description: Retrieve the current configuration parameters of a specific hardware channel.
This method allows to readout all relevant channel parameters opposite to C2xConfigureChannel
Note: This method can only be used with VN4610 hardware.
return: 0 or error code according to the following.
